name: Nanlite FS-60B Bi-Color Studio Spotlight
description: Portability is key to the design of the FS-60B Bi-Color LED Light from Nanlite.

features.Key Features :: For Live Events, Broadcast & Video | Output: 13,360 Lux at 3.3' (5600K) | 2700-6500K CCT | AC Power
features.What’s In The Box :: Nanlite FS-60B Bi-Color Studio Spotlight | Nanlite Forza Mini Reflector | Nanlite Forza 60 Bowens Mount Adapter | Power Cord (9.8') | COB Protective Cap | Limited 2-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Registration Extension: 1-Year
